features: Package Includes: 2 pieces fingernail brush, enough to meet your different cleaning and scrubbing needs or replacement.
Premium Material: Stainless steel handle brush with poly-hair brush; smooth surface, exquisite and beautiful appearance.
Easy to Carry: The size of the nail brush is 10.2*3.3 cm/4*1.3 inches, which is suitable in size, easy to hold in the hand, and easy to carry around.

Easy to Use: The cleaning brush helps to remove odors, such as onions, fish, garlic, shrimp and other odors. Don’t worry about scratching your hands. It is very practical and useful in your daily life.
Wide Application: This nail brush can not only clean nails and hands; it can also be used in kitchens, bathrooms, garden sinks, and is very suitable for removing dirt on hands, fingertips and feet.
description: Product Description Specifications: Color: sliver Quantity: 2 pieces Material: stainless steel Size: 10.2*3.3 cm/ 4*1.3 inches Features: 1. The handle of this nail brush is made of sturdy high-quality stainless steel, small and exquisite, very suitable for family and travel use. 2. The bristles of the nail brush are made of soft nylon plastic to ensure that it will not scratch your skin. It will bring a lot of convenience to your daily life. 3. It is very suitable for cleaning nails, fingernails, hands and toenails; it can also be used in kitchens, bathrooms, garden shed sinks, allowing you to have a clean life. High-quality Materials The nail brush is made of premium stainless steel, which is durable and easy to maintain. The bristles of the nail brush are made of nylon plastic, with moderate hardness, which is easy to clean the nails. Suitable Size to Carry Each nail brush is approximately 10.2 cm / 4 inches long and 3.3 cm / 1.3 inches high. The nail brush can be placed in a travel bag or handbag. Easy to hold in the hand, easy to clean, non-slip design, good hand feeling. This household brush is loved by most people and is suitable for homes and salons. Brushes can be used in kitchens, bathrooms, garden sheds, and can also be used for nail cleaning. Use cold/tap water to wet the stainless steel handle and rub it in your hand for 30 seconds. This will help remove odors such as onions, garlic, fish and other strong odors. This nail brush is easy to grasp. Putting your nails and hand brush in the bathroom can easily and comfortably remove dirt on hands, feet, nails, clothes, shoes, hats, etc.
